name: Revenge of Reborn Princess
overview: Noblewoman Wen Wan once idolized Su Xuanjing, the most revered lord in the imperial city, but her wedding night turned into betrayal, leading to her family’s tragic massacre. Reborn with a thirst for revenge, Wen Wan is determined to change her fate, only to uncover a deeper conspiracy behind the tragedy. As the massacre’s shadows rise again and secrets unfold, Wen Wan must navigate this treacherous path—will her second chance be enough to alter her destiny?

trailers.title: 《風華鑒》開播│名門貴女以暴制暴·死局換生路~深情皇子為愛淪陷·以命換真心！
